posts.text_html:
Quick iOS 27 Beta Thoughts

https://hunsanger.me/quick-ios-27-beta-thoughts/

Fun little design enhancements to Hunsanger Studio:
- Notification count indicator
- Inclusion of Hunsanger.me logo
- International Orange color accent (to match the site theme)
- Also added a publish preflight checklist
posts.text:
Fun little design enhancements to Hunsanger Studio:
- Notification count indicator
- Inclusion of Hunsanger.me logo 
- International Orange color accent (to match the site theme)
- Also added a publish preflight checklist

posts.text_html: Playing around with the new Safari vibe coded extensions feature, and while it is a bit flakey, was able to pretty easily whip up an @kepano flexoki theme for Mastodon.
posts.text: Playing around with the new Safari vibe coded extensions feature, and while it is a bit flakey, was able to pretty easily whip up an @kepano flexoki theme for Mastodon.

posts.text_html: #11ty keeps surprising me with it's flexibility and the way it can work with YAML/frontmatter. For example, I decided I wanted to add a navigation group for a few pages on my site, and just configured 11ty to support reading a new navGroup and navGroupOrder YAML field along with a nav true/false YA…
posts.text: #11ty keeps surprising me with it's flexibility and the way it can work with YAML/frontmatter. For example, I decided I wanted to add a navigation group for a few pages on my site, and just configured 11ty to support reading a new navGroup and navGroupOrder YAML field along with a nav true/false YA…

posts.text_html: One of the cooler features of my new #11ty site is the ability to just have everything be controlled with Obsidian + YAML (and a simple/handy github push Obsidian extension I whipped together).
posts.text: One of the cooler features of my new #11ty site is the ability to just have everything be controlled with Obsidian + YAML (and a simple/handy github push Obsidian extension I whipped together).

posts.text_html:
My new home on the web. A post will be coming at some point explaining the move and the reasons why, but really happy with my new 11ty backend site.

hunsanger.me

**whispers** check out the /phones page 👀

posts.text_html:
Early days, but I took @viticci@mastodon.social ’s excellent REMCTL work and input it into my a vibe-coded weekend project to make an updated Things-esque app for Reminders.

Not fully functional yet, but neat to get sub-sections working as well as proper tagging.
posts.text:
Early days, but I took @viticci@mastodon.social ’s excellent REMCTL work and input it into my a vibe-coded weekend project to make an updated Things-esque app for Reminders.

Not fully functional yet, but neat to get sub-sections working as well as proper tagging.

posts.text_html: I got access to RStudio's AI enhanced beta, and oh my is it nice... Much number crunching to be had here, and way easier then copy/pasting between Claude Code/Codex and RStudio.
posts.text: I got access to RStudio's AI enhanced beta, and oh my is it nice... Much number crunching to be had here, and way easier then copy/pasting between Claude Code/Codex and RStudio.

posts.text_html:
I took the excellent work by @josephjefe.bsky.social and did some customizations to come up with some additional data points (PFF Snaps and rating data) to evaluate salary cap info, and hosted my first Shiny app which allows anyone to run this for all 32 teams.

hunsanger.shinyapps.io/shiny/
posts.text:
